info.title: Elite Guard API
info.description: API documentation for the Elite Guard application.

get.description: Fetches a list of availability submissions for the authenticated employee.

post.description: Employee submits their availability for a specific date and shift.
Update a previously submitted availability if it is still pending.

post.summary: Upload user documents (Bank and License details)
Send OTP to email for password reset

message.example: Account doesn’t exist with this email

post.summary: Reset password with email confirmation and OTP

message.example: Email not matched with given OTP

get.summary: Get active numbers for the Application
get.description: Fetches numbers specifically categorized for 'Application' usage.

get.summary: Get offer letter for the authenticated user

post.summary: Accept and sign the offer letter for the authenticated user

get.description: Fetches a list of open shifts that the authenticated employee can claim.

post.description: Employee sends a request to claim a specific open shift. Subject to admin approval.

422.description: Validation error (e.g. shift full or already claimed).

get.description: Fetches a list of all claims made by the authenticated employee, including their status.

is_user_selected.description: True if the user picked this option in their last attempt.

400.description: Validation Error, Already Signed, or Quiz Failed

message.example: You did not achieve the required passing score.

post.summary: Submit orientation quiz answers and calculate score
post.description: Allows users to submit their answers for an orientation quiz. It calculates the score, determines pass/fail status, saves the attempt, and provides feedback on incorrect questions.

message.example: The orientation id field is required.

get.description: Sends a panic notification to all currently logged-in users (active sessions) who have an FCM token. Includes the sender's name in the message.

message.example: Panic notifications sent successfully to all registered devices.

get.summary: Get pay slips for the authenticated user

post.description: Allows a user to sign a specific policy by providing their agreement, a signature, and optionally a signed document file.

policy_id.description: ID of the policy to be signed

agreed.description: Whether the user agrees to the policy

message.example: You have already signed this policy.

get.summary: Get schedules for the authenticated user
get.description: Fetches schedules for the authenticated user for a specific week. Defaults to current week.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Any date within the target week (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

message.example: The confirm password and new password must match.

get.summary: Get sites assigned to the authenticated user
Get NFC tags for a specific site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to fetch NFC tags for

200.description: NFC tags for the specified site fetched.

message.example: NFC tags for the specified site fetched.

404.description: Site not found or no tags found.

get.summary: Get NFC tag check points for a specific site

parameters.name: site_id
parameters.description: ID of the site to fetch NFC tag check points for

200.description: NFC tag check points for the specified site fetched.

message.example: NFC tags Check Points for the specified site fetched.

404.description: Site not found or no check points found.

get.summary: Get all NFC tag check points

200.description: All NFC tag check points fetched.

message.example: NFC Tags Check Points retrieved successfully.

get.summary: Get all tax documents with submission status for the authenticated user

submitted.description: True if the authenticated user has already submitted this document

post.summary: Submit a tax document for the authenticated user

tax_document_id.description: ID of the tax document type from tax_documents table

message.example: You have already submitted this tax document.

first_name.description: Updates user table name combined with last_name
